Bitmap data and definitions for display resources, including images and hexadecimal digits in XBM format.


## Files
- **[dead_face.xbm](dead_face.xbm.md)**: Bitmap data for a 92x44 pixel "dead face" image used in display drivers.
- **[empty_bar.xbm](empty_bar.xbm.md)**: Defines a 96x8 pixel empty bar bitmap for display resources.
- **[error_url.xbm](error_url.xbm.md)**: Defines a bitmap image for an error URL with dimensions 109x14 pixels.
- **[hex_digits.h](hex_digits.h.md)**: Defines bitmaps for displaying hexadecimal digits on a screen in XBM format.
- **[pebble_logo.xbm](pebble_logo.xbm.md)**: Bitmap data for the Pebble logo with dimensions 105x27 pixels.
